scripts.build:site: bun run --cwd website build && bun run --cwd docs docs:build && cp -r docs/.vitepress/dist website/dist/public/docs
scripts.build: bun run marketplace:check && bun run build:cli && bun run build:web && (cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets) && bun run build:hub
scripts.build:single-exe: bun run marketplace:check && bun run download:tunwg && bun run build:web && (cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets) && (cd cli && bun run build:exe:allinone)
scripts.build:single-exe:all: bun run marketplace:check && bun run download:tunwg && bun run build:web && (cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets) && (cd cli && bun run build:exe:allinone:all)
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:cli && bun run typecheck:web && bun run typecheck:hub
scripts.test: bun run docs:plugin-api:check && bun run test:scripts && bun run test:shared && bun run test:cli && bun run test:hub && bun run test:web
scripts.marketplace:check: bun run marketplace:generate:check && bun run marketplace:validate && bun run marketplace:check-packaging
